decisions: The Agenda, as submitted, was unanimously approved by a vote of 3-0.
The financial reports of February 29, 2024, were unanimously approved by a vote of 3-0.
The regular monthly meeting minutes held on February 22, 2024, were unanimously approved by a vote of 3-0.
The Board voted to approve the payment of invoices totaling $7,336.49.
